name: Banana-Butter Pecan Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. Grease cookie sheets.
In a large bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed, beat the butter until fluffy. Gradually add the sugar; beat until light and fluffy. Beat in the egg, molasses, and mashed bananas. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, and cinnamon. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture; beat until thoroughly blended. Stir in the chopped pecans.
Drop the dough by rounded teaspoonfuls 2 inches apart onto the prepared cookie sheets. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, or until the center of the cookies springs back when lightly touched. Remove from wire racks to cool completely.
